title: senna chloroclada
intro: Senna chloroclada, also known as Cassia auriculata, is a plant species within the Fabaceae family and is commonly found in tropical regions. The plant contains anthraquinone compounds, which contribute to its medicinal properties. The medicinal properties of Senna chloroclada include laxative and anti-inflammatory effects, which provide relief from constipation and other digestive issues. Herbal preparations of Senna chloroclada are typically made into teas, tinctures, or capsules and are used to promote digestion, reduce inflammation, and support overall health.
